snippet.title: C. Tangana: Tiny Desk (Home) Concert
snippet.description:
The Tiny Desk is working from home for the foreseeable future. Introducing NPR Music's Tiny Desk (home) concerts, bringing you performances from across the country and the world. It's the same spirit ‚ÄĒ stripped-down sets, an intimate setting ‚ÄĒ just a different space.

Anamaria Sayre | April 20, 2021
C. Tangana's extended family basking in the warmth of sobremesa with easy smiles and effortless baile looks otherworldly after more than 13 months amid a global pandemic. But considering the Spanish rapper's past year back home in Madrid, the simplicity feels fiercely authentic. (Check his mama and t√≠a vibing in the corner.)

This first live performance of his latest album, El Madrile√Īo (including a global premiere of a fresh single, "Me Maten") buzzes with communal energy, spotlighting talent from across Latin landscapes. From Mexican Regional to Spanish flamenco, C. Tangana is simultaneously coming home and reaching out to bridge Latin music boundaries. He's building a community of cross-cultural collaboration, rooted in a unifying love of language and tradition, making it clear he's intent on giving everyone a seat at the table.

The entirety of the show, from impromptu harmony to string octet, hums along with a distinctly Spanish cadence, paying homage to the flamenco-infused streets the global superstar came up in. The concert's star-studded cast of Spanish collaborators, including long-time friends (producers Alizzz and Victor Mart√≠nez) and new contributors (rumba legend Kiko Veneno and flamenco-pop icon La H√ļngara), are each spotlighted for their contributions to the record.

All these parts compound in a room full of people with a shared desire to connect and create juntos, manifesting an authentic joy we've seen again and again at the real Tiny Desk. And at the helm is C. Tangana, humming a melody and bringing the room to life: hands, harmonies, heartbeats, perfectly in sync.

SET LIST
C. Tangana and Antonio Carmona, "Me Maten"
C. Tangana and Kiko Veneno, "Los Tontos"
C. Tangana, "Demasiadas Mujeres"
C. Tangana, La H√ļngara and Ni√Īo De Elche, "T√ļ Me Dejaste De Querer"

MUSICIANS
C. Tangana: vocals
Alizzz: vocoder, keys
Victor Mart√≠nez : guitar, percussion
Antonio Carmona: vocals, percussion
Kiko Veneno: vocals, guitar
La Hungara: vocals
Ni√Īo De Elche: vocals, guitar
Juan Carmona: guitar
Huberto Morales: percussion
Lucia Fernada Carmona: vocals
Pilar Cerezo: vocals
Marina Carmona: vocals
√Āfrica Heredia: vocals
Mar√≠a Rubio: vocals
Mariola Orellana: vocals
Patri Alfaro: vocals
Mari Estrada: vocals

STRING OCTET
Pablo Quintanilla
Paula Sanz
Franciso Palaz√≥n
Marina Arrufat
Paloma Cueto-Felgueroso
Adri√°n V√°zquez
Irma Bau
Daniel Acebes

CREDITS
Video: Little Spain, Santos Bacana, Maria Rubio, Cris Trenas
Audio: Jorge Rodriguez, Sergio Jim√©nez, Pablo Kohler, Harto Rodriguez, El Madrile√Īo, Alex Cappa
Director of Photography: Nauzet Gaspar
Art Director: Mariola Viejo
Costume Designer: Alex Turri√≥n
Hair and Makeup: Miky Vall√©s

TINY DESK TEAM

Te imaginas tener un Coche de 3 colores diferentes segun la hora del dia? 
Por la noche morado, por la tarde gris y por el dia arcoiris, una pasada.

snippet.description:
Holi pinguis! Hoy le traje el storytime que les promet√≠ cuando medio les cont√© algo sobre uno de mis peores d√≠as. Esta es la historia completa... aunque aun no ha terminado.

toda la polemica con relacion a la comunidad LGTB ha sido mucho mas grande de lo que cualquiera pudo imaginarse.. sin embargo, como les menciono en el video, de todo se aprende y se sale siendo mejor.

para quienes est√©n interesados en acceder a los documentos completos, lo pueden hacer en este link.
 - 

Los amo mucho de verdad, y de nuevo gracias por estar conmigo, y crecer junto a mi.

Kika.

snippet.title: Chicharito outduels Gonzalo Higuain as LA Galaxy wins thriller in Miami | ESPN FC MLS Highlights
snippet.description:
Javier "Chicharito" Hernandez scored two goals in his first Major League Soccer season with LA Galaxy. After an 11-minute stretch in the second half of the Galaxy's season opener, he has already matched that. Chicharito's brace sparks a Galaxy comeback, capped by a Sacha Kljestan goal in a 3-2 win vs. Inter Miami. Gonzalo Higuain scores a goal and adds an assist for Miami in Phil Neville's first match in charge.

#ESPNFC #MLS #InterMiami #LAGalaxy #Chicharito

‚úĒ Subscribe to ESPN+: http://espnplus.com/soccer/youtube
‚úĒ Subscribe to ESPN FC on YouTube: http://bit.ly/SUBSCRIBEtoESPNFC

Yo no quiero desearle mala suerte
Ni pedirle que vuelva a mi lado
Solo quiero que sufra como sufro
Que le duela haberme abandonado

Ya me voy, llevo en mi alma una herida
Su recuerdo no puedo olvidarlo
Solo s√© que destroz√≥ mi vida
Que Dios la guarde y le d√© su perd√≥n

Solo siento dejar mis pobres padres
Sus consejos no supe yo entender
Si la muerte o el destino nos condenan
Yo me conformo con mi propio padecer

#ChristianNodal #LosPlebesDelRancho #JGMusic

snippet.title: Stunning Juvenile Golden Eagle Flies Alongside Drone
snippet.description:
ID: 3430912

ONSCREEN CREDIT - @coolguyfpv

A photographer captured some amazing drone footage of a juvenile golden eagle flying above mountain peaks.

Clark Checketts filmed the amazing moment in the mountains outside of Springville, Utah, US, on February 14.

Clark was flying his drone above the peaks when suddenly he stumbled across a juvenile golden eagle.

The drone and the eagle kept flying close to each other for a few minutes and Clark was able to capture some unique images.

snippet.description:
Tania Ericksen, la directora de la Agencia del Medicamento danesa, se desmay√≥ en plena rueda de prensa cuando se anunciaba que  Dinamarca suspende la vacunaci√≥n con AstraZeneca a sus ciudadanos.

La Direcci√≥n General de Sanidad danesa considera que existen otras vacunas en el mercado para continuar inmunizando a su poblaci√≥n, cuando la situaci√≥n epidemiol√≥gica en el pa√≠s esta actualmente bajo control, con una incidencia acumulada estable en torno a los 129 casos por cada 100.000 habitantes en los √ļltimos 14 d√≠as. Hasta el momento, el grueso de las vacunas administradas en el pa√≠s corresponden a la vacuna de Pfizer/BioNTech, basada en ARNm, pero no han descartado la posibilidad de volver a utilizarla en el futuro, si la pandemia empeorara poniendo en riesgo al sistema sanitario.

Mystical bitches
Making our own sisterhood

Mother nature on the phone
What have you been doing?

Racism and misogyny
Nothing‚Äôs hidden anymore

God forgive America

Human beings listen

Truth and all its glory
The ending of a story

Everything just falls away
Our life as we knew it
Now belongs to yesterday
Inside all the love and the hate
We can all regenerate
Stop how we been living
Every single day

From my system until
Human beings listen
Tell me, who‚Äôd you think are?
It‚Äôs your own decision
But your home is now your prison
You forgot that without me
You won‚Äôt go far

We only make up one quarter of the government
Like an angel gone to hell
Cast the moon under our spell
Owning our power
Taking back what‚Äôs ours

Earth is like a white rose
Quiet cloud of petals cold
A place so corrupt where Angel‚Äôs flesh and blood is sold
The feminine is born as new
Studded with a diamond dew
Saw the dawn was coming
Everybody knew

El Bayern es el tercer campe√≥n consecutivo en quedarse eliminado antes de las semis en la Liga de Campeones.
